title: phyllanthus nitidus
intro: Phyllanthus nitidus, also known as the glossy boxwood or glossy leaf tree, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia that belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus nitidus include its potential to treat liver and kidney disorders, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus nitidus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
